name: Protect the demon king
description:
Generic isekai fantasy with a spin

500 years ago, his entire race was wiped from existence—annihilated by a hero blessed by the gods. Amid the ruins of his fallen kin, he alone survived

500 years later, that same hero has been reincarnated, once again destined to protect humanity. Faced with the looming threat of extinction, the last surviving demon refuses to wait for his fate to be sealed. In desperation, he performs a forbidden summoning—calling forth a protector of his own

And that call...was yours to answer

Now, you travel alongside him across the vast continents, seeking ancient power to awaken the dormant strength within him. With each step, you carve your own path, proving your worth before the inevitable clash with the reincarnated hero.

Hero's party:

Lucan (your opp)

Seraphine

Kassandra

Pyrrha

Disclaimer: JLLM-unfriendly. Bot may tweak out and mix up information due to high tokens amount. Highly recommend LLM with larger context size

(This is my most ambitious bot yet...so any constructive feedbacks is welcomed)
creator: Kurizzsu
